TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-school_Panay

S.FORM: yu adidi henay kami sa tayni kami i tini picudad pi picudadan sa.
S.TRANSL: 當我們小的時候，我們來學校。
When we were little, we came to school.

S.FORM: katuud ku kami u Sakizaya tayni i picudadan.
S.TRANSL: 很多我們撒奇萊雅的人來學校。
Many of Sakizaya people came to school.

S.FORM: i tawya henay sa u zazan nu nu niyam u i tiniay i Sapad haw masakayakay ku zazan.
S.TRANSL: 那時候我們Sapad這裡的路要爬坡。
At that time, we ascended the road.

S.FORM: ca’ay ka kaamutu tu ca’yay kahiya tu tu kakapah ku zazan.
S.TRANSL: 路還未鋪水泥。
The road was not paved yet.

S.FORM: u lucilucikan ku tapiingan.
S.TRANSL: 旁邊有很多芒草。
There was a lot of silver grass along the roadside.

S.FORM: katukuh i tini i picudadan i pi…cudadan sa maapac tu.
S.TRANSL: 上學遲到了。
We were late for school.

S.FORM: mahiya tu nu sinsi i syopacen tu nu sinsi kami i tini i pi i picudadan.
S.TRANSL: 在教室內被老師處罰。
We were punished by our teacher in classroom.

S.FORM: u u pinanamen niyam tini i picudadan i pasibana’ ku saydan sa.
S.TRANSL: 在學校我們學的是老師教的。
What we learned at school was what the teacher taught.

S.FORM: cay katineng tu cudad kyami.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們不會讀書。
Because we were not good at studying.

S.FORM: mungangangangaw aca ku nipisanuhulam.
S.TRANSL: 我們說的國語也不是很好。
Our Chinese was not good too.

S.FORM: a misakamu tu nu hulam a kamu sa ma…kaynah tu nu hya nu nu saydan kami.
S.TRANSL: 說的國語不好時，我們被老師罵。
Our teacher scolded us when we spoke poor Chinese.

S.FORM: tawya henay sa da’cus a misakamu tu nu Pangcah a kamu u nu mita nu Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 那時候，我們不能說阿美族的話還有撒其萊雅語。
At that time, we were not allowed to speak Amis and Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nu kaw nu nu hulam ku kamu sa ku ku saydan sa.
S.TRANSL: 老師說一定要說國語。
The teacher said that we had to speak Chinese.

S.FORM: ca’ay kapakapulu’ u nu nu Sakizaya ku kamu u nu.
S.TRANSL: （他們）不能阻止我們說撒奇萊雅的話。
(They) could not stop us from speaking Sakizaya.

S.FORM: nu Amis ku nu masaAmisay a kamu.
S.TRANSL: 阿美族族人說阿美語。
Amis people speak Amis.

S.FORM: u nu mita tu u maliyuhay tu micudad i tawya henay makaynah tu nu saydan.
S.TRANSL: 不會讀書的我們常常被老師罵。
We who were not good at studying were scolded by the teacher.

S.FORM: hatiza ku ni u liyuh tawya henay.
S.TRANSL: 那時候還不會。
We were not able to do it then.

S.FORM: taluma sa tu taluma makamelaw tu taw u nu taway tu u picudad a pi hya mi picudadan sa tayni i tabakiay a cacudadan.
S.TRANSL: 我們回家看到其他人上國中。
We went home and saw other people go to junior high school.

S.FORM: pisekingan henay ku picudad i tawya heney i.
S.TRANSL: 那時候上國中還要考試。
At that time, we needed to take exam to enter junior high school.

S.FORM: cucong cay kahini u nu ku u nu kuocong i mahini.
S.TRANSL: 初中不像現在的國中。
Cucong was not like Kuocong now.

S.FORM: izaw ku micudaday sa mainal ku balucu’.
S.TRANSL: 看到學生心生羨慕。
When I saw students, I envied them.

S.FORM: cay pakaletep ku tanga’ nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 我們的頭腦比不上人家。
We were not as smart as they were.

S.FORM: mahiza.
S.TRANSL: 就是這樣。
That’s it!
